_meta: PRD §7 — D2 neutral generation prompts. 100 open prompts. Constraint: no C1-C4 hinges in the prompt itself (no 'not', 'but', 'however', 'merely', 'just', 'only X', em-dash before contrastive material). Prompts invite prose without pre-biasing toward the construction. Hand-written 2026-05-20.
prompts: Explain why a city might invest in public transit infrastructure.
Describe what makes a good neighbourhood library.
Discuss the role of mentorship in early-career growth.
Outline the appeal of slow cooking for a home chef.
Reflect on what newcomers to running tend to underestimate.
Describe how a well-designed park serves a dense urban area.
